zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Fraser於1229年之後出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾特維德斯姆爾時，他的父親Gilbert Fraser8791歲，母親Christian Lascelles8795歲。他和Grizzle Flava至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1280年在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Fraser于1229年之后出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾特維德斯姆爾时，他的父亲Gilbert Fraser8791岁，母亲Christian Lascelles8795岁。他和Grizzle Flava至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1280年在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Fraser was born after 1229, in Tweedsmuir, Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, Gilbert Fraser, was 8791 and his mother, Christian Lascelles, was 8795. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Grizzle Flava. He died in 1280, in his hometown, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Fraser est né après 1229, à Tweedsmuir, Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, Gilbert Fraser, avait 8791 ans et sa mère, Christian Lascelles, avait 8795 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Grizzle Flava. Il est décédé en 1280, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Fraser nach 1229 in Tweedsmuir, Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Fraser 8791 und seine Mutter Christian Lascelles 8795. Er hatte mit Grizzle Flava mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1280 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Fraser è nato il dopo il 1229 nel Tweedsmuir, Peeblesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gilbert Fraser, aveva 8791 anni e il suo madre, Christian Lascelles, aveva 8795 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Grizzle Flava. Morì nel 1280, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Oliver Castle, Tweedsmuir, Peebleshire,: スコットランドペエブレシュアイアトウィードスムイル
ja.lifeSummary: Simon Fraserが1229年以後にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアトウィードスムイルで生まれた時，父Gilbert Fraserは8791歳，母Christian Lascellesは8795歳であった。彼はGrizzle Flavaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1280年に故郷で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Fraser(이)가 1229년 이후 스컷랜드 피블레실르 트위드스무이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Fraser(은)는 8791세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Lascelles(은)는 8795세였다. 그는 Grizzle Flava(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Fraser nasceu após 1229, em Tweedsmuir, Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gilbert Fraser, tinha 8791 anos e sua mãe, Christian Lascelles, tinha 8795 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Grizzle Flava. Ele faleceu em 1280, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Fraser родился после 1229 г. в местности твидсмуир, пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Fraser было 8791 год, а матери, которую звали Christian Lascelles, 8795. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Grizzle Flava. Он умер в 1280 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Fraser nació después de 1229, en Tweedsmuir, Peeblesshire, Scotland, su papá, Gilbert Fraser, tenía 8791 años y su mamá, Christian Lascelles, tenía 8795 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Grizzle Flava. Murió en 1280, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
